payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark leather (appears black) three-seat reclining couch with segmented, vertically stitched padded cushions and rounded armrests with visible cup-holder/control panels; shown in a full-front view, largely uncropped, photographed at approximately 2.0 meters from the camera and appearing in good condition.
